recommendations.title: Dragon Ball Z: Lord Slug
recommendations.overview: A Super Namekian named Slug comes to invade Earth. But the Z Warriors do their best to stop Slug and his gang.

recommendations.overview: A two-part crossover special featuring characters from Dragon Ball Z, One Piece and Toriko.

recommendations.title: Dragon Ball Z: Wrath of the Dragon

recommendations.title: Dragon Ball Z: Broly - The Legendary Super Saiyan
recommendations.overview: While the Saiyan Paragus persuades Vegeta to rule a new planet, King Kai alerts Goku of the South Galaxy's destruction by an unknown Super Saiyan.

recommendations.title: Dragon Ball Z: Battle of Gods

recommendations.title: Dragon Ball Super: Broly

recommendations.title: Dragon Ball Super: Super Hero
recommendations.overview: The Red Ribbon Army, an evil organization that was once destroyed by Goku in the past, has been reformed by a group of people who have created new and mightier Androids, Gamma 1 and Gamma 2, and seek vengeance against Goku and his family.

recommendations.title: Returner
recommendations.overview: A young woman from the future forces a local gunman to help her stop an impending alien invasion which will wipe out the human race.
